name: AutoDirectionTypeEnum
summary: The auto direction type defines how a connection or detail coordinate system will be oriented automatically.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_NA
enum_values.summary: The auto direction will not be available.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_BASIC
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type for usual joints will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_DIAGONAL
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type for diagonal joints will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_SPLICE
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type for splices will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_DETAIL
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type for details will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_GLOBAL_Z
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type with joint direction at the global Z will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_SEATING
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type for seating joints will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_PRIMARY_X
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type with joint direction parallel to the primary X-axis will be used.

enum_values.name: AUTODIR_FROM_ATTRIBUTE_FILE
enum_values.summary: The auto direction type is fetched from the loaded attribute file.
